page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: ECtyper is a python program for serotyping E. coli genomes
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Ectyper is a standalone serotyping module for Escherichia coli. It supports fasta and fastq file formats. (Galaxy Version 1.0.0)
